# Button

Triggers an action or submits a form.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/button
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview slug="button" example={0} code={`<Button>Save changes</Button>`} />

```tsx
<Button>Save changes</Button>
```

<ComponentPreview slug="button" example={1} code={`<Button variant="outline">Cancel</Button>`} />

```tsx
<Button variant="outline">Cancel</Button>
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="button"
  example={2}
  code={`<Button variant="ghost" size="sm">Learn more</Button>`}
/>

```tsx
<Button variant="ghost" size="sm">
  Learn more
</Button>
```

<ComponentPreview slug="button" example={3} code={`<Button loading>Saving…</Button>`} />

```tsx
<Button loading>Saving…</Button>
```

## Props

| Prop           | Type            | Required | Default | Description                                                                                                                                           |
| -------------- | --------------- | -------- | ------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `asChild`      | `boolean`       | No       | -       | -                                                                                                                                                     |
| `loading`      | `boolean`       | No       | -       | -                                                                                                                                                     |
| `loadingLabel` | `string`        | No       | -       | Accessible label announced while \`loading\`. Defaults to \`"Loading"\`. Pass a<br />localized string when the surrounding app supplies translations. |
| `size`         | `ButtonSize`    | No       | -       | -                                                                                                                                                     |
| `variant`      | `ButtonVariant` | No       | -       | -                                                                                                                                                     |

## Variants

| Variant   | Values                                |
| --------- | ------------------------------------- |
| `variant` | `solid`, `outline`, `ghost`, `subtle` |
| `size`    | `sm`, `md`, `lg`                      |

## Registry

- Manifest: `/r/button.json`
- Recipe: `button`
- Files: `src/components/ui/button.tsx`
